lines: France absolutely steamrolled Jim's Sweden 3–0 yesterday — Jim, mate, you still have Spain so don't panic, but watching your Swedish lads get mullered while Callum, Croft, Dene and The Foreman all pocketed points must have stung like a bastard.

Norway squeaked past Côte d'Ivoire 2–1, which was lovely for the Norway cartel — Al, Butters, Callum, Croft and Wilmot all cashing in like they're running some kind of Scandinavian pyramid scheme. Five of you. FIVE.

Special mention to The Foreman, sitting 10th with 31 points — your two eliminated teams are Türkiye and Curaçao, which is genuinely one of the worst combinations since 2-in-1 shampoo, and now you're basically praying France carry you to glory. Embarrassing, mate. Truly embarrassing.

Today's big one: England vs DR Congo — Carter, you absolute jammy cunt, you've got BOTH teams in this fixture, meaning you literally cannot lose. Meanwhile Butters and Wilmot are also sweating on their respective sides, and Butters leads the whole table at 59pts so has the most to protect.

Also today: Dene has a filthy double-header with Bosnia and Herzegovina vs USA AND Belgium vs Senegal — if both his teams get through, he rockets up the table, so watch Dene go from 8th to suddenly relevant for the first time in recorded history.
